label: Tier 2 Access Gate
description: Gate Tier 2 checkout (one-time and subscription) and findings access. Disable to force all to Tier 1 (free scan only).

label: Tier 3 Access Gate
description: Gate Tier 3 checkout and delivery service. Disable to prevent paid delivery orders.

label: Service Principal Onboarding
description: Enable Mode B (SP credentials) onboarding flow. Safe to disable if only Mode A is supported.

label: Lighthouse Onboarding
description: Phase 2 only. Enable Azure Lighthouse cross-tenant delegation mode.

label: Stripe Subscription Mode
description: Enable monthly subscription option at Tier 2. If false, only one-time payment shown.

label: Delivery Service
description: Enable delivery service trigger on Tier 3 checkout completion.

label: GTM Analytics
description: Load GTM container script (GA4 + Clarity). Still requires user consent to fire tags.

label: French Locale
description: Enable fr-CA locale in the language selector. Phase 1 required.

label: Scan Resource Limit
description: Resource Graph pagination limit per scan. Increase to 5000 for Phase 2 enterprise.

label: Cost Collection Window
description: Number of days of cost history the collector pulls from Cost Management.

label: FX Rate Refresh
description: Hours between FX rate refreshes for currency display conversion.

label: Entitlement Cache TTL
description: APIM caching TTL for GET /v1/entitlements per subscriptionId (matches APIM policy).

label: SAS URL Expiry
description: Hours before a deliverable download SAS URL expires.

label: Tier 2 One-Time Price
description: Price in CAD for Tier 2 one-time access (findings report).

label: Tier 2 Monthly Price
description: Price in CAD per month for Tier 2 subscription.

label: Tier 3 One-Time Price
description: Price in CAD for Tier 3 full delivery (findings + IaC templates + PDF report).
